nasb.text: And the congregation sent 12,000 of the valiant warriors there, and commanded them, saying, “Go and strike the inhabitants of Jabesh-gilead with the edge of the sword, with the women and the little ones.

esv.text: So the congregation sent 12,000 of their bravest men there and commanded them, “Go and strike the inhabitants of Jabesh-gilead with the edge of the sword; also the women and the little ones.

cnv.text: 因此會眾從勇士中差派一萬二千人到那裡去，吩咐他們說：“你們去用刀擊殺基列．雅比的居民，連婦女與孩子都要殺。

ccb.text: 于是，会众派出一万二千精兵，命令他们杀掉基列·雅比人及其妇女和孩子。
